writing.phase_focus: Build the sentence-level skills that underpin all paragraph and text writing

sentence_level.title: Identify sentence vs fragment
sentence_level.note: Foundation — diagnostic to see where your class is at.

sentence_level_daily.title: Sentences vs fragments
sentence_level_daily.description: Define a sentence (subject + verb). Display 6 fragments and 4 complete sentences mixed. Students sort and justify, then convert 3 fragments into complete sentences.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Ochre Unit Plan Week 3 Lesson 11 — Sentence-Level Writing section
sentence_level_daily.bsla_ref: BSLA Planning Guidance p.10 — Fragments to Sentences task

sentence_level_daily.title: Run-on sentences
sentence_level_daily.description: Define a run-on sentence. Display 4 run-on sentences, model identifying where one thought ends. Students fix 4 run-ons by adding a full stop or conjunction.
sentence_level_daily.bsla_ref: Taumata 10 target; BSLA Y4 Writing Exemplars Lesson 3 p.6

sentence_level_daily.title: Fragments and run-ons mixed practice
sentence_level_daily.description: Provide 8 items (fragments, run-ons, correct sentences). Students label each (F/R/C) and correct the errors.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_ref: Combine Ochre L11 approach with BSLA run-on model

sentence_level_daily.title: Sentence expansion
sentence_level_daily.description: Introduce question word strategy (who, what, when, where, why, how). Provide kernel sentence, model expanding. Students expand 2 kernel sentences.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Ochre Unit Plan Week 1 Lesson 1; Novel Study Guide Lesson 1 Writing section

text_level_daily.title: Introduce narrative text structure
text_level_daily.description: Review macrostructure: character, setting, action, problem, resolution. Use a familiar story to identify each element. Create anchor chart.
text_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L4 (Planning the introduction to a narrative text)
text_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Novel Study Guide Lesson 4 Writing section
text_level_daily.bsla_ref: BSLA Y4 Writing Exemplars Lesson 1 p.4; BSLA Planning Guidance p.17 narrative text type table

text_level_daily.title: Narrative planning — graphic organiser
text_level_daily.description: Introduce narrative web/organiser. Model planning using key words (not full sentences). Students plan their own narrative.
text_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L4 (Planning the introduction to a narrative text)
text_level_daily.bsla_ref: BSLA Y4 Writing Exemplars Lesson 1 p.4-5

text_level_daily.title: Character and setting paragraph — shared writing
text_level_daily.description: Model writing character/setting introduction paragraph from plan. Focus on paragraph layout, descriptive language, opening sentence.
text_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L5 (Writing an introduction to a narrative text)
text_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Novel Study Guide Lessons 4-5 Writing section; p.27 Mentor Text

text_level_daily.title: Character and setting paragraph — independent writing + revision
text_level_daily.description: Students complete paragraph. Model rereading and checking for sense, missing details, punctuation.
text_level_daily.bsla_ref: BSLA Y4 Writing Exemplars Lesson 2 p.2-3

writing.phase_focus: Build the sentence-level skills that underpin all paragraph and text writing

sentence_level_daily.title: Four sentence types
sentence_level_daily.description: Teach statement, question, command, exclamation with definitions and punctuation. Students write one of each about the same topic.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Ochre Unit Plan Week 2 Lesson 7; Grammar S&S Year 4 Term 1 Week 5

sentence_level_daily.title: Because / but / so
sentence_level_daily.description: Teach each conjunction’s purpose: because (why), but (contrast), so (result). Provide sentence stem, students write 3 compound sentences.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L2 (Chapters 2 and 3: Because, but, so)
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Ochre Unit Plan Week 1 Lesson 2; Novel Study Guide Lesson 2 Writing section

sentence_level_daily.title: Subordinating conjunctions
sentence_level_daily.description: Introduce dependent/independent clauses. Teach when, before, after, although. Model dependent clause + comma + independent clause. Students complete 3 sentences.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Ochre Unit Plan Week 2 Lesson 6; Grammar S&S Year 4 Term 3 Weeks 1-4

sentence_level_daily.title: Mixed sentence practice
sentence_level_daily.description: Classify 6 sentences by type. Choose best conjunction for 3 stems. Convert 2 commands into questions or statements.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L8 (Chapter 8: Sentence types); Ochre L17 (Chapter 13: Sentence types)

text_level_daily.title: Action paragraph — planning
text_level_daily.description: Explain action/build-up section purpose. Model planning using key words on narrative organiser.
text_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L9 (Writing an action paragraph of a narrative text)
text_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Novel Study Guide Lesson 9 Writing section

text_level_daily.title: Action paragraph — drafting
text_level_daily.description: Model writing from plan. Focus on time connectives, past tense, paragraph layout.
text_level_daily.bsla_ref: BSLA Y4 Writing Exemplars Lesson 2 p.5

text_level_daily.title: Problem paragraph — planning and drafting
text_level_daily.description: Explain purpose (what is the problem, how does character feel). Model planning and writing. Focus on descriptive emotional language.
text_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L10 (Writing a problem paragraph of a narrative text)
text_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Novel Study Guide Lesson 10 Writing section

text_level_daily.title: Resolution and conclusion — drafting
text_level_daily.description: Explain resolution and conclusion. Students plan, draft, and begin revising. Model revision for sense, sequence, paragraph breaks.
text_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L14 + Ochre L15 (Resolution and concluding paragraphs)
text_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Novel Study Guide Lessons 14-15; p.27-28 Mentor Text

writing.phase_focus: Build the sentence-level skills that underpin all paragraph and text writing

sentence_level.title: Write four sentence types
sentence_level.note: Move from identifying to writing each type.

sentence_level_daily.title: Direct speech — speaker tag after
sentence_level_daily.description: Teach pattern: "Speech," said the character. Identify examples from reading. Students write 3 lines of dialogue.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Grammar S&S Year 3 Term 3 Week 3; Year 4 Term 2 Week 10
sentence_level_daily.bsla_ref: Taumata 10 target — Dialogue; BSLA Planning Guidance p.10

sentence_level_daily.title: Direct speech — speaker tag before
sentence_level_daily.description: Teach pattern: The character said, "Speech." Compare with Day 1. Students write 3 lines.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Grammar S&S Year 4 Term 4 Weeks 7-8

sentence_level_daily.title: Direct speech — practice with both positions
sentence_level_daily.description: Fix 4 lines of dialogue with missing punctuation. Write a 4-line exchange using both patterns.

sentence_level_daily.title: Sentence expansion with dialogue
sentence_level_daily.description: Combine expansion with dialogue: "Speech," said the character + as he/she [action]. Students write 3 expanded dialogue sentences.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Novel Study Guide Lesson 12 Writing section

text_level_daily.title: Revise the complete narrative
text_level_daily.description: Reread full narrative. Model revision: paragraph purpose, run-ons/fragments, missing details.
text_level_daily.bsla_ref: BSLA Y4 Writing Exemplars Lesson 3 p.6

text_level_daily.title: Edit the complete narrative
text_level_daily.description: Model editing: spelling (circle and check), punctuation (read aloud), paragraph layout. Limit to 6-8 spelling corrections.
text_level_daily.bsla_ref: BSLA Y4 Writing Exemplars Lesson 3 p.6

text_level_daily.title: Add dialogue to the narrative
text_level_daily.description: Model inserting 2-3 lines of dialogue at appropriate points. Students add dialogue to their narrative.

text_level_daily.title: Final read and share
text_level_daily.description: Final reread and corrections. 3-4 students share. Class feedback: 2 stars and a wish.

writing.phase_focus: Topic sentences, supporting details, paragraph plans, and persuasive writing

sentence_level.title: Identify subject and predicate
sentence_level.note: The Who and the Do. Essential for expansion.

sentence_level_daily.title: What is a topic sentence?
sentence_level_daily.description: Define topic sentence. Display 3 sets (one TS + two SDs each). Students identify and justify.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L21 (Chapter 15: Identifying topic sentences and supporting details)
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Novel Study Guide Lesson 21 Writing section
sentence_level_daily.bsla_ref: BSLA Planning Guidance p.16 — paragraph plan template

sentence_level_daily.title: Matching supporting details to topic sentences
sentence_level_daily.description: Provide 2 topic sentences and 6 mixed supporting details. Students match correctly.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L22 (Chapter 16: TS and SD to write a paragraph)
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Novel Study Guide Lesson 22 Writing section

sentence_level_daily.title: Writing supporting details
sentence_level_daily.description: Provide a topic sentence. Students generate 2-3 supporting details. Model turning into a complete paragraph with concluding sentence.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L27 (Chapter 20: TS and supporting details)

sentence_level_daily.title: Improving topic sentences
sentence_level_daily.description: Provide 3 boring topic sentences. Teach strategy: use different sentence types to make engaging. Students rewrite each.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Novel Study Guide Lesson 23 Writing section

text_level_daily.title: Introduce persuasive text structure
text_level_daily.description: Define persuasive text. Explain macrostructure. Choose topic, brainstorm both sides. Students decide position and record ideas.
text_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L19 (Persuasive writing - Point of view)
text_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Novel Study Guide Lesson 19; p.29-30 Mentor Text

text_level_daily.title: Plan and write the introduction
text_level_daily.description: Teach GST structure (General, Specific, Thesis). Introduce rhetorical questions. Model and students write introduction.
text_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L20 (Writing an introductory paragraph for a persuasive text)
text_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Novel Study Guide Lesson 20 Writing section

text_level_daily.title: Plan body paragraph 1 using SPO
text_level_daily.description: Teach Single Paragraph Outline (Topic sentence, Supporting details, Concluding sentence). Introduce emotive language. Students complete SPO.
text_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L24 (Planning the body paragraph of a persuasive text)
text_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Novel Study Guide Lesson 24 Writing section

text_level_daily.title: Draft body paragraph 1
text_level_daily.description: Model writing paragraph from SPO. Focus on connectives, emotive language, staying on topic.
text_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L25 (Writing a body paragraph of a persuasive text)

writing.phase_focus: Topic sentences, supporting details, paragraph plans, and persuasive writing

sentence_level.title: Sort words / turn fragments into sentences

sentence_level_daily.title: High modality language
sentence_level_daily.description: Compare low vs high modality. Students rewrite 4 sentences using high modality language.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Ochre Unit Plan Week 6 Lesson 29

sentence_level_daily.title: Sentence combining — compound sentences
sentence_level_daily.description: Review coordinating conjunctions. Students combine 4 pairs of simple sentences.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Grammar S&S Year 4 Term 2 Weeks 6-7; Writing S&S Year 4 Unit 8

sentence_level_daily.title: Sentence combining — complex sentences
sentence_level_daily.description: Review subordinating conjunctions. Students combine 4 pairs, varying dependent clause position.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Grammar S&S Year 4 Term 3 Weeks 1-4

sentence_level_daily.title: Connectives for linking arguments
sentence_level_daily.description: Teach connectives for addition, contrast, cause/effect. Students link 4 pairs of sentences.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Writing S&S Year 4 Unit 7

text_level_daily.title: Plan body paragraph 2 using SPO
text_level_daily.description: Students generate their own TS and complete SPO. Begin drafting.

text_level_daily.title: Draft body paragraph 2 + revise
text_level_daily.description: Complete drafting. Revise both body paragraphs.

text_level_daily.title: Plan and write the conclusion
text_level_daily.description: Teach TSG conclusion structure (mirror of introduction). Students plan and write.
text_level_daily.ochre_ref: Ochre L30 (Write a concluding paragraph for a persuasive text)
text_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Novel Study Guide Lesson 30 Writing section

text_level_daily.title: Revise and edit the complete persuasive text
text_level_daily.description: Full revision and editing cycle. 2-3 students share.

writing.phase_focus: Topic sentences, supporting details, paragraph plans, and persuasive writing

sentence_level.title: Use conjunctions: because, but, so
sentence_level.note: First expansion skill. High-impact for writing.

sentence_level_daily.title: Identifying key words and phrases
sentence_level_daily.description: Model identifying key words from non-fiction passage. Students practise with second passage.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Writing S&S Year 4 Unit 6

sentence_level_daily.title: Converting sentences into notes
sentence_level_daily.description: Model converting 4 sentences into abbreviated notes. Students convert 4 sentences.

sentence_level_daily.title: Converting notes back into sentences
sentence_level_daily.description: Model paraphrasing from notes. Students write 4 sentences from provided notes.

sentence_level_daily.title: Summary sentences
sentence_level_daily.description: Define and model summary sentences. Students write summaries for 2 paragraphs.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Writing S&S Year 3 Unit 5; Year 4 Units 6-8

text_level_daily.title: Introduce expository text structure
text_level_daily.description: Define information report or explanation. Explain macrostructure. Students identify structure in mentor text.
text_level_daily.bsla_ref: BSLA Planning Guidance p.17 expository table; p.14 Sequential Organisers

text_level_daily.title: Note-taking from sources
text_level_daily.description: Model note-taking using graphic organiser from 2-3 non-fiction texts.

text_level_daily.title: Plan the introduction
text_level_daily.description: Teach introduction structure for expository text (general, specific, thesis). Students plan and write.

text_level_daily.title: Plan body paragraph 1 using SPO
text_level_daily.description: Model SPO using notes from graphic organiser. Students complete SPO and begin drafting.

writing.phase_focus: Extended writing across text types, writing process, independence

sentence_level.title: Expand sentences to summarise key ideas
sentence_level.note: Ties sentence skills to reading comprehension.

sentence_level_daily.title: Appositives — identify
sentence_level_daily.description: Define appositives. Students identify and underline in 4 sentences.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Ochre Unit Plan Week 7 Lesson 31; Grammar S&S Year 3 Term 4 Weeks 9-10; Year 4 Term 3 Week 6

sentence_level_daily.title: Appositives — match and add
sentence_level_daily.description: Match appositives to nouns. Add to sentences with correct comma punctuation.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Ochre Unit Plan Week 7 Lessons 32-33

sentence_level_daily.title: Appositives — write original
sentence_level_daily.description: Students write and insert their own appositives into 3 sentences.

sentence_level_daily.title: Tense consistency
sentence_level_daily.description: Model identifying and correcting tense shifts. Students practise with 2 paragraphs.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Grammar S&S Year 4 Term 3 Weeks 7-8

text_level_daily.title: Draft body paragraphs 1-2
text_level_daily.description: Students draft from SPOs.

text_level_daily.title: Draft remaining body paragraphs + subheadings
text_level_daily.description: Complete body paragraphs. Teach and add subheadings.

text_level_daily.title: Draft conclusion + visual elements
text_level_daily.description: Teach conclusion structure. Students write conclusion and add one visual element.

text_level_daily.title: Revise the complete expository text
text_level_daily.description: Full-text revision: structure, tense, paragraph coherence.

writing.phase_focus: Extended writing across text types, writing process, independence

sentence_level.title: Expand with adjectives and adverbs
sentence_level.note: Adds detail and interest to writing.

sentence_level_daily.title: Edit for punctuation
sentence_level_daily.description: Students identify and correct 8-10 punctuation errors in a passage.
sentence_level_daily.bsla_ref: BSLA Y4 Writing Exemplars Lesson 3 p.6

sentence_level_daily.title: Edit for spelling
sentence_level_daily.description: Circle and check strategy. Students correct 6-8 spelling errors.
sentence_level_daily.bsla_ref: BSLA Y4 Writing Exemplars Lesson 3 p.6

sentence_level_daily.title: Paragraph layout
sentence_level_daily.description: Students identify paragraph breaks in continuous text and rewrite with correct layout.
sentence_level_daily.bsla_ref: Taumata 10 target; BSLA Scope & Sequence Year 4

sentence_level_daily.title: Sentence variety check
sentence_level_daily.description: Model varying sentence openings (adverbial, dependent clause, -ing verb). Students rewrite a paragraph.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Writing S&S Year 5 Unit 9 — Vary sentence openings

text_level_daily.title: Edit the expository text
text_level_daily.description: Independent and peer editing.

text_level_daily.title: Publish or present the expository text
text_level_daily.description: Final copy + visual elements. Optional oral presentation.

text_level_daily.title: Second narrative — planning
text_level_daily.description: New stimulus. Multi-paragraph plan (more structured than Week 1).
text_level_daily.bsla_ref: BSLA Y4 Writing Exemplars Lesson 1 p.4

text_level_daily.title: Second narrative — drafting orientation and action
text_level_daily.description: Apply all learned skills: sentence types, expansion, dialogue, paragraph layout.

writing.phase_focus: Extended writing across text types, writing process, independence

sentence_level_daily.title: Show Don’t Tell
sentence_level_daily.description: Model converting telling sentences into showing. Students convert 3.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Writing S&S Year 5 Unit 9
sentence_level_daily.bsla_ref: BSLA Scope & Sequence Year 5 — Show Don’t Tell

sentence_level_daily.title: Figurative language — simile
sentence_level_daily.description: Define simile (like/as). Students write 4 similes.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Writing S&S Year 4 Unit 2
sentence_level_daily.bsla_ref: BSLA Scope & Sequence Year 4 — Simile, metaphor

sentence_level_daily.title: Figurative language — metaphor
sentence_level_daily.description: Define metaphor. Compare with simile. Students write 3.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_doc_ref: Writing S&S Year 5 Unit 9

sentence_level_daily.title: Sentence-level revision of narrative draft
sentence_level_daily.description: Students revise looking for opportunities: show don’t tell, simile, metaphor, varied openings, expansion.

text_level_daily.title: Draft problem and resolution paragraphs
text_level_daily.description: Continue drafting. Model inserting dialogue at key moments.

text_level_daily.title: Draft conclusion + revise full text
text_level_daily.description: Complete narrative. Full-text revision.

text_level_daily.title: Edit and peer feedback
text_level_daily.description: Independent editing + peer conference (2 stars and a wish).

text_level_daily.title: Publish and share
text_level_daily.description: Final copy. Class sharing with identification of writing techniques.

sentence_level.title: Complex sentences (subordinating conjunctions)
sentence_level.note: Because, although, when, if. Highest level.

sentence_level_daily.title: Mixed sentence skills review
sentence_level_daily.description: 10-item quiz: fragments, run-ons, sentence types, conjunctions, dialogue punctuation. Review as class.
sentence_level_daily.ochre_ref: Draws on Ochre L11, L2-3, L6, L7-8, Week 3 dialogue

sentence_level_daily.title: Paragraph skills review
sentence_level_daily.description: Arrange sentences into coherent paragraph. Write a paragraph from a provided TS.

sentence_level_daily.title: On-demand writing assessment — planning
sentence_level_daily.description: Writing prompt. Students plan independently (10-15 min).

sentence_level_daily.title: On-demand writing assessment — drafting
sentence_level_daily.description: Students write from plan (25-30 min). Collect for assessment.

text_level_daily.title: Complete unfinished work
text_level_daily.description: Catch-up time or free-choice writing.

text_level_daily.title: Complete unfinished work
text_level_daily.description: Catch-up time or free-choice writing.

text_level_daily.title: Reflection and goal-setting
text_level_daily.description: Portfolio review. Identify improvements and goals for next term.

text_level_daily.title: Celebration and sharing
text_level_daily.description: Gallery walk or author’s chair. Class positive feedback.

lesson_1.name: Introduce pattern
lesson_1.day: Same day as PhOM PPT L1 (first half)

lesson_2.name: Review + practise writing
lesson_2.description: Review and practice writing words and phrases with target pattern words
lesson_2.day: Same day as PhOM Paper L2 (We Do + You Do)

lesson_3.name: Review + game/activity
lesson_3.description: Review and play game/activity using words from the week
lesson_3.day: Same day as PhOM Paper L2 (Spelling + OWLs)

resources.note: Single PPT covers all Taumata-wide spelling lessons with scripts and guidance on lesson structure.

end_of_taumata_test.note: Administered in Week 10 of each Taumata.
